hero.title: AMA FRUITS S.R.L.
hero.subtitle: Production and Distribution of Fresh Produce and Organic Products
hero.description: The Natale Family has been operating in the fruit and vegetable sector for over 40 years. Distribution across Italy and international markets: Tunisia, Morocco, Egypt and Spain.

about.title: The Natale Family — over 100 years in fresh produce
about.description: Michele Natale and Gioele Natale lead AMA Fruits srl, a company specialising in the production and distribution of fresh fruit, vegetables and organic products. Our family has been in the sector for over a century — professionals committed to serving our communities and markets.
points: Production and distribution of fresh produce
Wide range of certified organic products
Presence in EU and non-EU markets

products.title: Quality fresh fruit & vegetables
products.description: For each product we offer a wide range of varieties to meet the needs of every market

items.name: Table Grapes
items.desc: Selection of fine sweet and crunchy varieties

items.name: Citrus Fruits
items.desc: Oranges, lemons, mandarins — fresh and fragrant

items.name: Peaches & Apricots
items.desc: Juicy summer fruit, harvested at peak ripeness

items.name: Artichokes
items.desc: Fresh artichokes typical of Italian tradition

items.name: Watermelons
items.desc: Large sweet watermelons, perfect for summer

items.name: Dried Fruits & Nuts
items.desc: High quality chestnuts, walnuts and hazelnuts

items.title: Production & Sourcing
items.desc: We select the best local and international producers to guarantee consistent quality.

items.title: Selection & Packaging
items.desc: Every product is carefully selected and packaged in the shortest possible time.

items.title: Immediate Refrigeration
items.desc: Refrigeration and rapid chilling facilities to preserve freshness and food safety.

items.title: International Distribution
items.desc: Partners with platforms in Tunisia, Morocco, Egypt and Spain for global distribution.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.description: We operate in the Guidonia Montecelio (RM) fruit and vegetable market and in several EU and non-EU countries.
contact.name: Full Name *
contact.success_desc: We will get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.desc: Production and distribution of fresh fruit, vegetables and organic products. The Natale Family serving Italian and international markets since 1980.
